response:
The CEO sent an email titled “Board Deck Review” that attaches a Q1 board deck draft outlining key performance metrics—127% of the revenue target achieved, 115% net revenue retention (NRR), and a 22% increase in customer acquisition cost (CAC)—and states the board meeting is scheduled for next Tuesday.
The CEO’s required action item for the recipient is to submit their product roadmap section for the Q1 board deck by Wednesday.
